title: Illumina COVIDSeq Test: Pool and Clean Up Libraries
author: Opentrons
description: The Illumina COVIDSeq Test is a high-throughput, next-generation sequencing test that is used fo detecting SARS-CoV-2 in patient samples. This protocol is the seventh part of a seven-part protocol that is run on the OT-2 for this kit. * Part 1: [Anneal RNA](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1) * Part 2: [Synthesize First Strand cDNA](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1-part-2) * Part 3: [Amplify cDNA](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1-part-3) * Part 4: [Tagment PCR Amplicons](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1-part-4) * Part 5: [Post Tagmentation Clean Up](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1-part-5) * Part 6: [Amplify Tagmented Amplicons](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1-part-6) * Part 7: [Pool and Clean Up Libraries](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1-part-7) Explanation of complex parameters below: * `P300 Multichannel GEN2 Pipette Mount`: Choose the mount position of your P300 Multichannel pipette, either left or right. * `P20 Multichannel GEN2 Pipette Mount`: Choose the mount position of your P20 Multichannel pipette, either left or right. ---
steps_raw: The Illumina COVIDSeq Test is a high-throughput, next-generation sequencing test that is used fo detecting SARS-CoV-2 in patient samples. This protocol is the seventh part of a seven-part protocol that is run on the OT-2 for this kit. * Part 1: [Anneal RNA](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1) * Part 2: [Synthesize First Strand cDNA](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1-part-2) * Part 3: [Amplify cDNA](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1-part-3) * Part 4: [Tagment PCR Amplicons](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1-part-4) * Part 5: [Post Tagmentation Clean Up](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1-part-5) * Part 6: [Amplify Tagmented Amplicons](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1-part-6) * Part 7: [Pool and Clean Up Libraries](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/04eeb1-part-7) Explanation of complex parameters below: * `P300 Multichannel GEN2 Pipette Mount`: Choose the mount position of your P300 Multichannel pipette, either left or right. * `P20 Multichannel GEN2 Pipette Mount`: Choose the mount position of your P20 Multichannel pipette, either left or right. ---
Engage Magnetic Module and wait 3 minutes for beads to pellet.
Pick up 20 uL tips from slot 7
Aspirate 5 uL from Column 1 (A1) of the Magnetic Plate on Slot 3
Pause protocol for vortexing and centrifuging 8-strip tube.
Pick up SINGLE 200 uL tip from slot 4
Aspirate 55 uL from A1 of 8-strip tube
Dispense 55 uL into 1.7 mL tube in A1 of Slot 6.
materials_raw: Bio-Rad Hard-Shell 96 Well Plate 200 µL PCR
